{{Quote|I have a friend who works for the Port Authority in Tyrena, on Corellia. His name is Amarent Loren.|[[Selan Ellison]], to a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]|<ref name="SWG:SC" />}}
'''Amarent Loren''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] bureaucrat who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he worked for the [[Corellian Port Authority]] at the [[Tyrena Starport]], in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]].<ref name="SWG:SC" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] investigated the disappearance of a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] transporting a man named [[Valance Serth]] while traveling from Corellia to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. The spacers discussed with a woman by the name [[Selan Ellison]], an acquaintance of Amarent Loren, in the [[Moenia Starport]] on Naboo and, following her advice, they then went to visit Loren in Tyrena. Amarent Loren was not eager to disclose any information as the [[Imperial Transit Authority/Legends|Imperial Transit Authority]] tightly controlled the activities of the Corellian Port Authority but he finally revealed that Valance Serth's shuttle crashed on the planet [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].<ref name="SWG:SC" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateCommonerHumanMale.png|250px|thumb|Every possible depiction of Amarent Loren]]
Amarent Loren was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Valance Serth was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 21 Notes for 4 August 2005|Publish 21]]," on [[August 4]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> After each server reset, Amarent Loren's appearance would fluctuate, but he was consistently depicted as a Human male.<ref name="SWG:SC" />
